title: Search Module Tests

tasks.description: Create SearchManager tests - Test search dispatch (basic, boolean, ranked, fuzzy), query detection (boolean operators, fuzzy markers, mixed queries), and result aggregation (combine results, deduplicate, sort by relevance)
testCategories: Search Dispatch (basic search, boolean search, ranked search, fuzzy search)
Query Detection (boolean operators, fuzzy markers, mixed queries)
Result Aggregation (combine from multiple, deduplicate, sort by relevance)

tasks.description: Create SavedSearchManager tests - Test save search (with name, parameters, prevent duplicates), execute saved search (by name, apply parameters, throw for unknown), manage saved searches (list, update, delete), and persistence (save to file, load on startup)
testCategories: Save Search (with name, parameters, prevent duplicate names)
Execute Saved Search (by name, apply parameters, throw for unknown)
Manage Saved Searches (list all, update, delete)
Persistence (persist to file, load on startup)

tasks.description: Create TFIDFIndexManager tests - Test index building (from entities, term frequencies, document frequencies), incremental updates (add entity, remove entity, update entity), search scoring (TF-IDF score, rank rare terms higher, multi-term queries), and performance (lazy-load, cache, invalidate on changes)
testCategories: Index Building (from entities, term frequencies, document frequencies)
Incremental Updates (add entity, remove entity, update entity)
Search Scoring (TF-IDF score, rank rare terms higher, multi-term queries)
Performance (lazy-load index, cache index, invalidate on changes)

tasks.description: Create SearchSuggestions tests - Test getSuggestions (entity names, entity types, tags, limit results), and ranking (by frequency, by recency, boost exact matches)
testCategories: getSuggestions (entity names, entity types, tags, limit results)
Ranking (by frequency, by recency, boost exact matches)

successCriteria: Search module coverage increases from 55% to 85%
notes: Search module already has decent coverage (55%) from existing tests, but the orchestration layer (SearchManager) and persistence layer (SavedSearchManager, TFIDFIndexManager) need more testing. This sprint focuses on the untested parts.
